## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests only
- [ ] Build / CI

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #42 -->

## How was this tested?

- [ ] `uv run ruff check src tests`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] Manual frontend run (`npm run dev`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] New or updated tests cover the change
- [ ] No new lint warnings
- [ ] Public surface area (env vars, API, events) is documented in the PR description
